pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.3.1 which requires Java 17+ and supports Java 21.
Upgrade Kotlin to version 2.0.0 to support newer language features and JVM targets.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.3.0 for better test execution support on newer JDKs.
Upgrade jib-maven-plugin to 3.4.3 for updated container image building capabilities.
Upgrade frontend-maven-plugin to 1.15.0 for updated Node.js/NPM integration.
Upgrade maven-assembly-plugin to 3.7.1 for bug fixes and improvements.
Upgrade maven-clean-plugin to 3.4.0 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-dependency-plugin to 3.7.1 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-deploy-plugin to 3.1.2 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-enforcer-plugin to 3.5.0 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-install-plugin to 3.1.2 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-jar-plugin to 3.4.2 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-release-plugin to 3.1.0 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade maven-resources-plugin to 3.3.1 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade sortpom-maven-plugin to 4.0.0 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade spotless-maven-plugin to 2.44.0.BETA1 for code formatting updates.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi to 2.5.0 for API documentation improvements.
Upgrade Jackson BOM to 2.17.1 for JSON processing updates.
Upgrade Log4j BOM to 2.23.1 for logging framework updates.
Upgrade JUnit BOM to 5.10.2 for testing framework updates.
Add Datafaker library for generating fake data in tests or application.

.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the Java version in GitHub Actions workflows from 17 to 21 to align with the target runtime.
Bump GitHub Actions dependencies (checkout, setup-java, login-action) to their latest major versions.

src/main/app/public/index.html.general_idea: Change the browser theme color from black to a specific blue shade.
Replace the specific project description with a generic GenAI learning application description.
src/main/app/public/index.html.human_impl: <meta name="description" content="Application that supports a journey of learning how to use GenAI to perform data processing tasks." />

src/main/kotlin/net/ddellspe/escapegenai.general_idea: Add a trailing comma to the function parameter list to comply with modern Kotlin style conventions.
Added a trailing comma to the list of permitted static resources for cleaner diff formatting.
Configured HTTP request authorization to permit all access to /game/** endpoints while requiring authentication for other requests.
